title: Trilegal advises investors on Pranos Fusion pre-series A fundraise
description: Pranos Fusion Private Limited has raised ₹63 crore from a pre-Series A fundraise co-led by Pi Ventures Fund II and Ankur Capital Fund III, with participation from existing investor Industrial47 and a group of angel investors.Trilegal advises both the lead investors, Pi Ventures and Ankur Capital, on this fundraise.The transaction team was led by Nikhil Sachdeva (Partner), with support from Mayank Malhotra (Counsel), Tushar Bakshi (Senior Associate) and Associates Madhur Patel and Ayush Shar
